description: Complete Nielsen CSD metadata reference with column definitions, meanings, and units

market_id.description: Foreign key to the Market dimension. Joins facts to market metadata. Never NULL.

period_id.description: Foreign key to the Period dimension. Joins facts to period metadata. Never NULL.

product_id.description: Foreign key to the Product dimension. Joins facts to product metadata. Never NULL.

sales_value.description: Total sales out of store expressed in Danish Krone (DKK). Consumer retail price including VAT (point-of-sale scanner data). This is the TOTAL — promo + non-promo combined. NULL = no data for this market/product/period combination.

sales_in_liters.description: Total sales out of store expressed in litres. Includes both promo and non-promo volume. NULL = no data for this combination.

sales_units.description: Total sales out of store expressed in consumer purchase units (individual packs / bottles / cans as scanned at checkout). Includes both promo and non-promo. NULL = no data.

sales_value_any_promo.description: Value of sales (DKK) made on any type of promotion (TPR, display, feature, or any combination). Subset of sales_value: total = promo + non-promo. NOT applicable in Total Market incl Hard Discount (Lidl is cash-slip only). A small number of fact rows show promo slightly exceeding total due to rounding (<1,000 DKK); cap with MIN(promo, total) when displaying. NULL = promo not tracked for this combination.

sales_in_liters_any_promo.description: Volume in litres sold on any type of promotion. Subset of sales_in_liters. NULL = promo not tracked. Not applicable in Total Market incl Hard Discount.

sales_units_any_promo.description: Units sold on any type of promotion. Subset of sales_units. NULL = promo not tracked. Not applicable in Total Market incl Hard Discount.

weighted_distribution.description: Average WEEKLY percentage of total CATEGORY TURNOVER (value sales) accounted for by stores that sold the selected product, ACV-weighted (All Commodity Volume). Stored as a fraction 0-1. Example: 0.85 = stores carrying this product represent 85% of category sales. More meaningful than numeric distribution because it weights by store importance. NOT additive across products. ~16.7% of CSD fact rows are NULL (aggregate levels, cash-slip markets like Lidl, or new products mid-period).

market.name: csd_clean_dim_market
market.description: Retail outlet types/channels (REMA 1000, NETTO, e-commerce, etc.) — NOT country

market_id.comment: Primary key for the Market dimension
market_id.description: Foreign key to the Market dimension. Joins facts to market metadata. Never NULL.

market_description.description: Human-readable name of the Nielsen market (retail chain, channel, or aggregate universe), e.g. 'DVH INCL. HD', 'COOP DK', 'Lidl'. Used for display and filtering.

period.name: csd_clean_dim_period
period.description: Monthly periods with Nielsen 4-4-5 week calendar

period_id.comment: Primary key for the Period dimension
period_id.description: Foreign key to the Period dimension. Joins facts to period metadata. Never NULL.

period_year.comment: Year when CSD facts were generated
period_year.description: Calendar year (integer, e.g. 2026) when the CSD facts row was generated. Derived from period_end_date.

period_month.comment: Month when CSD facts were generated
period_month.description: Calendar month number 1-12 when the CSD facts row was generated.

date_key.comment: Combination of month and year when CSD facts were generated
date_key.description: Combination of month and year as a single label (e.g. 'January 2026') for the CSD facts row.

product.name: csd_clean_dim_product
product.description: Products at varying hierarchy levels (category → manufacturer → brand → variant → UPC)

product_id.comment: Primary key for the Product dimension
product_id.description: Foreign key to the Product dimension. Joins facts to product metadata. Never NULL.

category.description: Top-level category label for this dataset: 'CSD' (Carbonated Soft Drinks). All rows in this dataset roll up to this category at hierarchy level 1.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer of the product as classified by Nielsen. One level below the corporation grouping in the standard Nielsen product hierarchy.

brand.description: Brand name as classified by Nielsen. The brand level sits below manufacturer and above sub-brand / variant in the product hierarchy.

ru_subbrand.description: Royal Unibrew internal sub-brand grouping. RU-defined classification used for internal reporting; one level below brand.

ru_variant.description: Royal Unibrew internal variant grouping. Below sub-brand in the RU-defined product hierarchy. Distinguishes flavour/format/recipe variants within a sub-brand.

packaging.description: Packaging description for the product (e.g. 'CAN', 'PET', 'GLASS'). Captures the primary container type.

size_variants.description: Product size variant description (e.g. '33CL', '50CL', '6X33CL'). Only populated at lower hierarchy levels (variant / packaging / UPC); NULL at aggregate levels like brand or manufacturer.

units.description: Number of consumer units per multipack (e.g. '1', '6', '24'). Stored as text.

item_description.description: Item description — the canonical Nielsen item label, typically combining brand + variant + size + packaging.

upc_code.description: Universal Product Code / barcode of the SKU. Lowest level of the product hierarchy (one row per UPC).

type.description: Product type classification within the category. Category-specific values; see the row's category context.

regular_light.description: Sugar content classification: regular (full sugar) vs. light/diet/zero. CSD-specific.

price_category.description: Nielsen price tier classification (e.g. 'PREMIUM', 'STANDARD', 'ECONOMY'). Groups products by relative price positioning within the category.

ru_cola_flavour.description: Royal Unibrew internal classification of cola flavor variants (e.g. 'REGULAR COLA', 'CHERRY COLA', 'VANILLA COLA'). RU-specific grouping for CSD analysis.

organic.description: Flag indicating whether the product is certified organic. Values are typically 'YES'/'NO' or category-specific labels.

private_label.description: Flag indicating whether the product is a retailer private label (e.g. Coop's 365, REMA 1000 own brand) versus a branded manufacturer product.

corporation_ru_1.description: Top-level corporate grouping. Groups brands under their parent corporation as defined by RU/Nielsen (e.g. groups 'PEPSI', 'FAXE KONDI' under 'PEPSI COLA INT.'). Same concept as corporation_ru (beer) and corporation_1 (energidrikke/RTD) — naming inconsistency to be standardized. NULL at aggregate levels.
